name: Node Space Desktop Flow Authoring
summary: Use Node Space Desktop to turn a newly discovered multi-node process into a wiki protocol, animated scenario sidecar, flow card, and future content-production brief.

steps.label: Desktop form writes the protocol page with route, narration, card hooks, and record rules.
JSON sidecar gives Atlas a durable machine-readable flow record to inventory later.
Approved protocol text becomes retrieval context for future agents and operators.
Desktop bridge checks local endpoints and reports which nodes can support the flow.
Retrieved context can return to Node Space as a richer scenario or content-production brief.

card.description: Use Node Space Desktop to turn a newly discovered multi-node process into a wiki protocol, animated scenario sidecar, flow card, and future content-production brief.
card.effect: Trace the route, reveal each handoff, and create a protocol record for reuse.
card.risk: Missing ownership or stale node state can make the route hard to reproduce.
